description: In this episode, the host discusses the journey of turning $5,000 into $10 million through various hustles and trading secrets. The guest shares insights on finding value in DeFi, starting from TikTok, and navigating the complexities of crypto investments.
topic_summary: The conversation covers the guest's entry into DeFi, strategies for identifying undervalued assets, and reflections on their early experiences in crypto trading [t=65:14].
